meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: ClawTeams
products.tagline: The first goal-driven, proactive AI team for e-commerce
products.summaryZh: 首个目标驱动、主动式电商AI团队
products.descriptionZh: ClawTeams是一个面向电商卖家的AI员工平台。无需雇佣专家，也无需亲力亲为——你将获得一个协调运作的AI团队，像真实员工一样思考、规划并执行任务。一个目标，一个团队，零微管理。只需告诉你的团队负责人你的需求——"将第四季度营收提升20%"——他们便会分解任务、指派专家并执行计划。你将在Slack或Discord中收到进度更新。重大决策会等待你的批准，其余一切自动推进。
products.description: ClawTeams is an AI employee platform for e-commerce sellers. Instead of hiring specialists—or doing everything yourself—you get a coordinated AI team that thinks, plans, and executes like real employees. One goal. One team. Zero micromanagement. Tell your team lead what you want—"Increase Q4 revenue by 20%"—and they break it down, assign specialists, and run the plan. You get updates in Slack or Discord. High-stakes decisions wait for your approval. Everything else just happens.

products.name: Pazi
products.tagline: Vibe code business operations
products.summaryZh: Vibe code 商业运营
products.descriptionZh: Pazi 是一个 AI 团队，为你反复浮现的那个想法而生——一本书、一家店、一个应用、一项你想出售的技能。告诉 Pazi 你想做什么，它就会围绕你的想法组建一个智能体团队，并开始推动事情落地：搭建网站、首次对外联络、内容创作、下一步行动。每次你回来，都会发现事情有了进展。你始终掌握主导权；你的团队与你并肩作战，一步一个脚印地推进。就像氛围编程，但应用于商业运营。
products.description: Pazi is an AI team for that idea you keep coming back to — a book, a shop, an app, a skill you want to sell. Tell Pazi what you're trying to do and it builds a team of agents around your idea and starts making things happen: a website, first outreach, content, the next step. Every time you come back, something has moved. You stay in control; your team does the rest alongside you, one real step at a time. Like vibe coding but for business operations.

products.name: Goose Ads Remixer
products.tagline: Remix the ads already winning in your niche
products.summaryZh: 混搭已在你的细分市场中胜出的广告
products.descriptionZh: 你的利基市场中胜出的广告揭示了有效元素：钩子、优惠、文案结构、布局。Goose学习这些模式，并在几分钟内用你的真实标志、产品图片和信息为你的品牌创建新广告。前10个广告免费。
products.description: The winning ads in your niche reveal what works: hooks, offers, copy structures, layouts. Goose learns those patterns and creates new ads for your brand with your real logo, product images, and messaging in minutes. First 10 ads free.

products.name: PgDog
products.tagline: Scale PostgreSQL without changing your app
products.summaryZh: 无需更改应用即可扩展PostgreSQL
products.descriptionZh: PgDog 是一个开源的 PostgreSQL 连接池、负载均衡器和分片代理。它兼容 Postgres、性能高效、安全可靠，由数据库工程师社区在开放环境中构建。
products.description: PgDog is an open source connection pooler, load balancer, and sharding proxy for PostgreSQL. It's Postgres-compliant, fast, secure and built in the open by a community of database engineers.

products.name: Agentcard for companies
products.tagline: Give your agent a debit card
products.summaryZh: 为您的智能体配备一张借记卡
products.descriptionZh: 为你的AI助手配备一张借记卡。从你的钱包中充值固定预算，生成一次性卡片，让AI助手能够在线购物。
products.description: Give your AI agent a debit card. Issue single-use cards funded from your wallet with a fixed budget so your agents can buy things online.

products.name: Portero
products.tagline: Know exactly what's running on every port of your Mac
products.summaryZh: 精确掌握Mac每个端口上运行的内容。
products.descriptionZh: Portero 是一款免费开源的 Mac 应用，可显示所有开放端口及其背后的进程。查看正在运行的内容、终止占用端口的进程、修复“地址已被使用”错误，并通过内置的 macOS 防火墙阻止端口。
products.description: Portero is a free, open source Mac app that shows every open port and the process behind it. See what's running, kill processes on busy ports, fix 'address already in use' errors, and block ports with the built-in macOS firewall.

products.name: Claude Overlay
products.tagline: A floating Claude Code chat that sees your screen
products.summaryZh: 一个悬浮的Claude Code聊天窗口，能够看到你的屏幕
products.descriptionZh: Claude Overlay 是一个无边框、始终置顶的聊天窗口，专为 Claude Code 设计，悬浮于所有操作之上。通过快捷键召唤，询问屏幕上任何内容，Claude 会在回答前捕获并读取你的显示器。它使用你自己的订阅运行完整的 Claude Code 代理——无需 API 密钥——因此不仅能聊天，还能编辑文件和运行命令。开源（MIT），支持 Windows。
products.description: Claude Overlay is a frameless, always-on-top chat window for Claude Code that floats over everything you do. Summon it with a hotkey, ask about whatever's on screen, and Claude captures and reads your monitors before answering. It runs the full Claude Code agent on your own subscription - no API key - so it can edit files and run commands, not just chat. Open source (MIT), Windows.

products.name: Branda
products.tagline: Turn any domain into on-brand ads, MIT Open Source
products.summaryZh: 将任意域名转化为品牌广告，MIT 开源
products.descriptionZh: Branda 可在数秒内将任意网站链接转化为吸睛且符合品牌调性的广告。粘贴链接后，Branda 通过 Context.dev 的品牌 API 提取品牌真实 Logo、配色及营销图片，读取首页内容使文案贴合品牌风格，并生成可直接投放至 LinkedIn 和 X 的创意素材。无需登录、无需设计技能、无需上传素材。开源且支持自托管。
products.description: Branda turns any website URL into scroll-stopping, on-brand ads in seconds. Paste a link and Branda pulls the brand's real logo, colors, and campaign imagery via Context.dev's Brand API, reads the homepage so the copy sounds like the brand, and generates ready-to-ship creatives for LinkedIn and X. No login, no design skills, no assets to upload. Open-source and self-hostable.

products.name: BugShot
products.tagline: Discover, fix, capture, and report bugs in one shot
products.summaryZh: 一次性发现、修复、捕获并报告漏洞。
products.descriptionZh: 在Chrome侧边栏捕获问题并提交完整报告。截图、控制台/网络日志及环境信息自动附加。或实时调整CSS，并排发送修改前后对比。AI为您草拟报告。免费、无需账户，直接发送至您的追踪系统。
products.description: Catch a bug and file a complete report from Chrome's side panel. Captures, console/network logs, and environment attach automatically. Or tweak the CSS live and send the before/after side by side. AI drafts it for you. Free, no account, straight to your tracker.

products.name: Animos App
products.tagline: Showcase your designs in motion
products.summaryZh: 以动态方式展示你的设计
products.descriptionZh: 用不到1分钟的时间，以高质量动态效果展示你的作品。Animos是一款为创作者打造的基于浏览器的动画工具。工作流程简单：选择模板，放入素材，调整并导出。拥有30多个模板、4K分辨率及MP4/WebM格式支持，你可以轻松为作品集生成惊艳且可直接用于网页的动画。
products.description: Present your work with high-quality motion in under 1 minute. Animos is a browser-based animation tool built for creators. The workflow is simple: pick a template, drop in your assets, tweak, and export. With 30+ templates, 4K resolution, and MP4/WebM support, you can easily generate stunning, web-ready animations for your portfolio.

products.name: Sales Studio
products.tagline: Private studio for live demos on macOS
products.summaryZh: macOS 上的私人工作室，用于现场演示
products.descriptionZh: Sales Studio 是 macOS 上用于现场演示的私人工作室。你的观众在 Zoom、Meet 或 Teams 中只会看到一个干净、精致的屏幕共享画面。而你则能看到自己的脚本、笔记、发言要点，以及所有可能切换的显示内容。无需再手忙脚乱地切换窗口。
products.description: Sales Studio is a private studio for live demos on macOS. Your audience sees one clean, polished screen share in Zoom, Meet, or Teams. You see your script, notes, talking points, and every display you might switch to. No more window juggling.

products.name: Flyout
products.tagline: Rich-text notes that fly out from your Mac's screen edge
products.summaryZh: 从Mac屏幕边缘飞出的富文本笔记
products.descriptionZh: 轻触屏幕边缘——或按下 ⌥⌘N——一个完整的富文本编辑器便会浮现在当前操作界面上。支持清单、提醒、文件夹、图片、代码块及 iCloud 同步。原生 macOS 应用，非 Electron 架构。终身授权，7 天免费试用。所有笔记底层均为纯 Markdown 格式。你的笔记数据不会触及我们的服务器。
products.description: Nudge your screen edge — or press ⌥⌘N — and a full rich-text editor flies out over whatever you're doing. Checklists, reminders, folders, images, code blocks, iCloud sync. Native macOS, not Electron. Lifetime license, 7-day free trial. Every note is plain Markdown underneath. Your notes never touch our servers.

products.name: Breva
products.tagline: Turn your Mac trackpad into a gentle breathing guide
products.summaryZh: 将你的Mac触控板变成一个轻柔的呼吸引导器
products.descriptionZh: Breva 将你的 Mac 触控板变成一个轻柔的呼吸引导工具。选择一种呼吸模式，设定练习时长，跟随一个柔和膨胀的光球，并可选配音频和触觉提示。它在本地运行，无需账户，帮助你无需拿起手机就能进行短暂的休息调整。
products.description: Breva turns your Mac trackpad into a gentle breathing guide. Choose a breathing pattern, set a session length, and follow a soft expanding orb with optional audio and haptic cues. It works locally, needs no account, and helps you take short reset breaks without reaching for your phone.

products.name: VocalVia
products.tagline: Turn documents and articles into editable multi-voice audio
products.summaryZh: 将文档和文章转化为可编辑的多角色音频。
products.descriptionZh: VocalVia 可将 PDF、Word 文件、Markdown、网页文章及粘贴文本转化为结构化大纲、可编辑播客脚本及自然的多语音音频。选择说话人与音色，精修各段落，然后导出成品音频。该工具专为离线阅读、学习笔记、研究论文及希望脱离屏幕聆听的长篇内容而设计。
products.description: VocalVia turns PDFs, Word files, Markdown, web articles, and pasted text into structured outlines, editable podcast scripts, and natural multi-voice audio. Choose speakers and voices, refine individual segments, then export the finished audio. It is built for saved reading, study notes, research papers, and long-form content you want to listen to away from a screen.

products.name: AutoShelf 2.0
products.tagline: Auto-organize files on your Mac now with MCP & CLI support
products.summaryZh: 现在即可通过MCP和CLI支持，在Mac上自动整理文件。
products.descriptionZh: AutoShelf 是一款 macOS 应用，可监控文件夹并自动整理文件。只需设置一次规则，便无需再操心。免费试用，解锁无限制版需 19.99 美元。
products.description: AutoShelf is a macOS app that watches your folders and auto-organizes files. Set a rule once and never think about it again. Free to try, unlock unlimited for $19.99.

products.name: Altersend
products.tagline: File transfer with no cloud storage, no account, no limits
products.summaryZh: 文件传输，无需云存储，无需账户，无限制
products.descriptionZh: AlterSend 直接在设备间传输文件——点对点、端到端加密、无云端存储、无需账户、无大小限制。开源且跨平台：支持移动端与桌面端。通过分享代码或扫描二维码，文件即可直接流式传输。
products.description: AlterSend sends files directly between devices - P2P, E2EE, no cloud storage, no account, no size limits. Open source and cross-platform: mobile + desktop. Share a code or scan a QR, and files stream straight across.

products.name: ClipFlow
products.tagline: Small video jobs, without a timeline
products.summaryZh: 小型视频任务，无需时间线
products.descriptionZh: ClipFlow 处理无需时间轴的小型视频任务。修剪、拼接、压缩、倒放、滤镜、字幕、静音、模糊或转换片段，然后继续处理结果。1.9版本新增部分倒放和13种滤镜样式。大部分处理在设备端运行。
products.description: ClipFlow handles the small video jobs that do not need a timeline. Trim, join, compress, reverse, filter, caption, mute, blur, or convert a clip, then continue with the result. Version 1.9 adds partial reverse and 13 filter styles. Most processing runs on device.

products.name: Mojave Paint
products.tagline: Direct manipulation of static images on the Mac platform
products.summaryZh: 在Mac平台上直接操控静态图像
products.descriptionZh: 即便到了2026年，位图图像依然是极为重要的传播媒介。正因如此，我开发了Mojave Paint——一款基于Mac的图像编辑器，让你真正掌控这些位图图像的创作。从初代Mac和Amiga时代起，就有人不断制作图像编辑器，我相信甚至更早之前也是如此。但不知为何，当代的选择总不尽人意。因此，我带来了一个新选项，由西雅图一家新兴软件工作室呈现。如果你在寻找AI功能，请另寻他处。
products.description: Bitmap images are still, even in 2026, a hugely important medium of communication. Which is why I made Mojave Paint – a Mac-based image editor that lets you really own the production of these bitmap images. They've been making image editors since the original Mac and the Amiga and I'm sure even long before that. But somehow the choices in the modern era fall short. So I have a new option, presented by an upstart software shop in Seattle. If you're looking for AI features, look elsewhere.

products.name: Sourclip
products.tagline: Turn NotebookLM into a complete research workflow
products.summaryZh: 将 NotebookLM 转变为完整的研究工作流
products.descriptionZh: Sourclip 是 NotebookLM 的研究工作流工具。它能帮你发现高质量研究来源，一键将网页、PDF、YouTube 视频、Reddit 帖子及 AI 对话捕获至 NotebookLM。通过文件夹整理所有内容，跨项目复用提示词，跨设备同步工作区，并将研究成果导出为 Markdown、HTML 或 PDF 格式。你还可以将 NotebookLM 的音频概览转换为私有播客订阅源，供 Spotify、Apple Podcasts、Pocket Casts 及其他播客应用使用。
products.description: Sourclip is the research workflow for NotebookLM. It helps you discover high-quality research sources, capture webpages, PDFs, YouTube videos, Reddit posts, and AI chats into NotebookLM with one click. Organize everything with folders, reuse prompts across projects, sync your workspace across devices, and export your research as Markdown, HTML, or PDF. You can also turn NotebookLM Audio Overviews into a private podcast feed for Spotify, Apple Podcasts, Pocket Casts, and other podcast apps.

products.name: Trump Accounts
products.tagline: Build long-term financial security for your child
products.summaryZh: 为您的孩子构建长期财务保障
products.descriptionZh: Trump账户帮助符合条件的美国儿童从幼年起开始建立长期财务增长。2025年至2028年间出生的合格儿童，自2026年7月4日起可获得美国财政部提供的1,000美元初始资金。该账户包含一项试点计划，为2025年1月1日至2028年12月31日期间出生、持有有效社会安全号码的美国公民儿童提供1,000美元资金。
products.description: Trump Accounts help eligible American children begin building long-term financial growth from an early age. Eligible children born between 2025–2028 can qualify for an initial $1,000 U.S. Treasury contribution beginning July 4, 2026. The account features a pilot program contribution of $1,000 for children born between Jan. 1, 2025, and Dec. 31, 2028, and who are U.S. citizens with a valid Social Security number.
